title: IOCs for Suspicious 'requirement' Binary
description: Indicators of Compromise for packed executable with embedded bash shell capabilities

upx_signatures: $Info: This file is packed with the UPX executable packer http://upx.sf.net $
$Id: UPX 5.02 Copyright (C) 1996-2025 the UPX Team. All Rights Reserved. $

behavioral_indicators.self_deletion: Binary removes itself from disk after execution
behavioral_indicators.memory_execution: Extracts and executes embedded content from memory
behavioral_indicators.anti_analysis: UPX signatures present but standard unpacking fails

detection_rules.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> any any (msg:"Suspicious requirement binary download"; content:"|7f|ELF"; offset:0; depth:4; content:"UPX"; sid:1000001;)

recommendations: Block execution of files matching these IOCs
Monitor for similar packed executables with embedded shells
Implement application whitelisting to prevent unauthorized executable execution
Use endpoint detection and response (EDR) tools to monitor for self-deleting executables
